name: pubmed-reader
description: Search and read biomedical literature from PubMed and PubMed Central via NCBI E-Utilities

tools.name: search_pubmed
tools.description: Search PubMed for biomedical articles by query and filters

tools.name: get_pubmed_article
tools.description: Get full metadata and abstract for a PubMed article by PMID

tools.name: read_pmc_fulltext
tools.description: Read full text of an open-access article from PubMed Central
